name: William L. Dawson
abstract: William Levi Dawson (September 26, 1899 – May 2, 1990) was an American composer, choir director, professor, and musicologist.

about_quotes.speaker: Walter P. Thomas
about_quotes.evidence: William L. Dawson was our first band teacher ... that man influenced me on tone? He had the most gorgeous tone on trombone I had ever heard
